name: raycast-core
title: Core Edge
description: Keyboard-first access to Core Edge search, capture, tasks, links, and work context.
author: slayga

commands.name: search-core
commands.title: Search Core
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Search Core Edge notes using hybrid retrieval.

commands.name: explore-core
commands.title: Explore Core
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Find a Core Edge record and traverse its graph.

commands.name: quick-capture
commands.title: Quick Capture
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Capture a typed Core Edge record with tags and links.

commands.name: link-records
commands.title: Link Records
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Create supported typed links between Core Edge records.

commands.name: what-next
commands.title: What Next
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Show the next actionable Core Edge tasks.

commands.name: open-loops
commands.title: Open Loops
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Show Core Edge operational diagnostics and open-loop records.

commands.name: agenda
commands.title: Agenda
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Show due and scheduled Core Edge tasks.

commands.name: recent
commands.title: Recent
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Show recently changed Core Edge records.

commands.name: project-context
commands.title: Project Context
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Inspect a Core Edge project's tasks, blockers, and context notes.

commands.name: browse-records
commands.title: Browse Records
commands.subtitle: Core Edge
commands.description: Browse Core Edge records by type.

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Core Edge Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL for the Core Edge server.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Core Edge API Token
preferences.description: Core Edge bearer token used for read-only API calls.

preferences.name: namespace
preferences.title: Namespace
preferences.description: Optional namespace override. Leave blank to use the token default.

preferences.name: resultLimit
preferences.title: Result Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of search results to show.

scripts.validate:bun: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run lint && bun run build
scripts.validate:npm: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
